basics.name: Chris Pelatari
basics.label: Blue Fenix Productions
basics.summary: With 25 years building production software—from startup MVPs to enterprise platforms processing millions of transactions—I deliver solutions that scale. A former Microsoft MVP and AspInsiders member, I specialize in full-stack .NET and modern web technologies. I've led teams, architected cloud migrations, and turned legacy systems into competitive advantages. Whether you need a senior engineer or a technical partner, I bring the depth to get it done right the first time.

work.summary: Founded Blue Fenix Productions to bring enterprise-grade engineering to businesses of every size. From Cancer Couture to custom CRM platforms, I deliver end-to-end solutions—architecture, development, deployment, and ongoing support—so clients get a technical partner, not just a contractor.

Led the modernization of critical healthcare systems at a Fortune 15 company. Drove legacy-to-cloud migration, built CI/CD pipelines that cut deployment times by 60%, and mentored cross-functional teams on modern .NET practices—directly improving product reliability for systems that healthcare providers depend on daily.

Grew from intern to CTO over 22 years at Velocity Databank, Inc., an oil and gas data company. Built and scaled the entire technology stack—custom CRM, seismic data platforms, and cloud infrastructure—while managing teams, vendor relationships, and a technology budget. A masterclass in ownership from the ground up.

interests.name: Project-Based Services
keywords:
Your Vision. Built Right. Delivered Fast.

You have a business problem—we turn it into working software. Blue Fenix Productions brings 25 years of production experience to every engagement, from greenfield builds to legacy rescues.

We work differently: no layers of account managers, no junior devs learning on your dime. You get a senior engineer who owns your project end-to-end—architecture through deployment.

Ready to move? Request a free consultation. We’ll scope your project, give you an honest timeline, and only move forward when you’re confident in the plan.

interests.name: DevOps
keywords:
Ship faster without breaking things. We design and implement CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, and AWS CodePipeline that automate your entire release process—from code commit to production. Infrastructure as code, automated testing, and zero-downtime deployments so your team can focus on building, not firefighting.

Hourly Rate: $150

interests.name: Frontend and Backend Development
keywords:
From RESTful APIs and microservices on ASP.NET Core to polished frontends in Vue.js, React, Angular, or Blazor—we build both sides of the stack and make them work together seamlessly. Every solution is right-sized to your problem: no over-engineered frameworks for simple needs, no shortcuts on complex ones.

Hourly Rate: $150
